name: DoubleConverter
summary: The DoubleConverter class converts types to and from the double datatype.

constructors.name: DoubleConverter
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DoubleConverter class

methods.name: CanConvertFrom
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the source type to the double datatype.

methods.name: CanConvertTo
methods.summary: Checks whether the conversion can be made from the double datatype to the destination type.

methods.name: ConvertFrom
methods.summary: Converts an object from the given culture to the Tekla.Structures.Datatype.Double type.

methods.name: ConvertTo
methods.summary: Converts an object from the double datatype to the given destination type.
